task_completion.description: Add SLF4J API and Logback Classic dependencies to the project
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the pom.xml file open in an editor showing <dependency> tags for 'org.slf4j:slf4j-api:2.0.9' and 'ch.qos.logback:logback-classic:1.4.14'.

task_completion.description: Create and configure logback.xml with a console appender and DEBUG level
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'logback.xml' in 'src/main/resources/' open in an editor. It must contain a console appender (e.g., <appender class="ch.qos.logback.core.ConsoleAppender">) and the root logger level set to DEBUG (<root level="DEBUG">).

task_completion.description: Import and instantiate SLF4J loggers in the required Java classes
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Java files (LibraryApp.java, BookService.java, BookRepository.java, SearchEngine.java) showing imports for 'org.slf4j.Logger' and 'org.slf4j.LoggerFactory', along with logger instantiations like 'Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(...)';

task_completion.description: Replace System.out and System.err statements with SLF4J logger calls
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Java source files showing 'logger.info(...)', 'logger.debug(...)', or 'logger.error(...)'. There should be no remaining 'System.out.println' or 'System.err.println' calls in the visible code.

task_completion.description: Ensure the project compiles successfully after modifications
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal window running 'mvn compile' (or similar build command) showing a 'BUILD SUCCESS' message, or an IDE build tool window indicating successful compilation without errors.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is working in the correct project directory
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the terminal prompt, IDE file explorer, or window title to ensure the project path is '/home/ga/IdeaProjects/library-app'.

integrity.description: Verify that Book.java was not unnecessarily modified
integrity.visual_evidence: If Book.java is visible, ensure it does not contain SLF4J logger imports or instantiations, as it originally contained no System.out statements.

integrity.description: Verify the compilation success is from a genuine build tool
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the terminal or IDE output to ensure the 'BUILD SUCCESS' message is part of a standard Maven/IDE build log, not just a text file or an 'echo' command.
